query: SELECT u.id, u.openId, u.name, u.email, u.loginMethod, u.createdAt, COUNT(h.id) as habitCount, COUNT(c.id) as checkInCount FROM users u LEFT JOIN habits h ON h.userId = u.id LEFT JOIN checkIns c ON c.userId = u.id GROUP BY u.id ORDER BY habitCount DESC;
